title: VSB STB - Reboot, Standby and Recovery
precondition: STB onboarding is completed. User is logged into the Sjónvarp Símans experience. Internet connection is available. Remote is paired and responsive.

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience is displayed
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed
User returns to Sjónvarp Símans home screen

steps.data: Use configured restart option for the test environment

steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen or expected startup screen is displayed

steps.step: Verify remote still works after reboot

steps.expectedResult: User remains logged in or is shown expected login/profile screen

steps.step: Start live TV playback after reboot
Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed and STB is stable after reboot

steps.data: Use the configured standby method for the test environment, such as remote power button or system standby option
Use the remote control or configured wake method

steps.step: Verify Sjónvarp Símans home experience after standby wake
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen or expected resume screen is displayed

steps.step: Verify internet connection after standby wake
steps.expectedResult: STB has working internet connection after waking from standby

steps.step: Verify remote still works after standby wake
Start live TV playback after standby wake
Return to Sjónvarp Símans home screen
steps.expectedResult: Sjónvarp Símans home screen is displayed and STB is stable after reboot and standby recovery
